chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2107 of 2023 Muhammad Waseem Ehtemam Versus Kashif Uzair & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.10189/23 3. For orders on Misc. No.10190/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 15.04.2024 None present. -.-.- Petitioner and his counsel were called absent on the first date of hearing and so also on the last date when it was adjourned with caution that in case they remain absent appropriate orders shall be passed. However, today position is same; neither petitioner nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
